compose.placeholder: Describe what happened. Be specific — date, place, who, what. Attach a photo with the button below if you have one.
compose.add_tag_placeholder: add a tag and press enter
compose.privacy_note: Lower precision = more privacy. Use 5 or below for sensitive contexts.
compose.error.invalid_relay_url: relay URL must start with ws:// or wss://
toast.published_0: no relays connected — held locally, will retry
feed.empty: No reports yet. Be the first.
feed.share_title: copy a shareable link to this report
share.title: Cockroach civic report
share.text: Signed civic report on the Cockroach network.
share.no_relay: no relay is reachable to host the shareable link
share.tell_friend_blurb: Send this site to anyone. They don't need to sign up — they open the link and they're in. No account, no email, no OTP. Just open and write.
share.tell_friend_how: How sharing works: every report you read has its own permalink (the ↗ share button on each card). The whole network has one address — thecockroachnetwork.com. Either one, sent to anyone with a phone, gets them in.
share.tell_friend_text: main bhi cockroach. signed civic reports — no account, no OTP, cannot be deleted.
identity.identity_blurb: Your ed25519 public key. This is your account. There is no email, no signup, no recovery — if you lose this device and have not exported the key, you lose this identity.
identity.regen_confirm: Generate a new keypair? Your current identity and reputation will be lost.
identity.relays_blurb: This client talks to many relays at once. Publishing fans out to all connected relays. Anyone can run one — see the run-a-relay guide.
identity.reset_confirm: Reset to the seed list shipped with this client?
identity.about_blurb: This is a reference client for the Cockroach Relay Protocol. ~700 lines of plain JavaScript. Read it, fork it, host your own copy, replace it entirely.
identity.whitepaper_blurb: Read the white paper for the why.
identity.privacy_blurb: Your secret key never leaves this browser. The relay you talk to sees your IP — for sensitive reporting use Tor or a VPN. Geohash precision 7 reveals your location to ~150 m; drop to 5 or below for sensitive contexts.
